home.heroTitle: Book the boat, skip the group chat
home.heroSubtitle: Session booking for rowing clubs — seats, waitlists and payment, sorted.
home.noClubs: You're not a member of any club yet.

club.joinBody: Once the club owner approves your request you can start booking sessions.
club.noteBanned: Access to this club is suspended

join.pending: Your request to join is pending approval.
join.approved: You're a member of this club.
join.rejected: Your request to join was rejected.
join.banned: You can't book sessions at this club right now.

verify.subject: Oarly — Verify your email
verify.heading: Verify your email
verify.body: Please verify your email address to activate your Oarly account. Just click the link below.

reset.subject: Oarly — Reset your password
reset.heading: Reset your password
reset.body: We received a request to reset your password. Click the link below to set a new one.

confirmation.subject: Oarly — Booking received
confirmation.introSeated: Your booking is confirmed. Details below.
confirmation.introWaitlisted: The session was full, so you've been added to the waitlist. We'll let you know if a seat opens up.

promotion.subject: Oarly — A seat opened up!
promotion.heading: You're in!
promotion.intro: You've been promoted from the waitlist — your seat is confirmed.

cancellation.subject: Oarly — Booking cancelled
cancellation.heading: Booking cancelled
cancellation.intro: Your booking has been cancelled. Details below.

auth.verifyBody: We sent you a verification link. Click the link in your email to continue.
auth.forgotBody: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.resetDone: Your password is updated. You can sign in now.
auth.kvkkConsent: I have read and accept the privacy policy and KVKK clarification text.
auth.kvkkNotice: By continuing you accept the privacy policy and KVKK clarification text.
auth.errorPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.errorConsent: You must accept the KVKK text to continue.
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
auth.googleError: Couldn't sign in with Google. Please try again.
auth.errorAccountNotLinked: This email already uses password sign-in. Enter your password above.

privacy.title: Privacy & KVKK
privacy.stub: The full clarification text and privacy policy will be published before launch.

admin.title: Admin
admin.name: Name
admin.errorOwnerNotFound: No user with that email. The account must be created first.
admin.errorNameInvalid: Club name must be at least 2 characters.
admin.actionError: Couldn't update the club. Try again.

requestClub.title: Club request
requestClub.body: Request to bring your club onto Oarly. Once an admin approves it, the club goes live.
requestClub.name: Club name
requestClub.submittedBody: Your club will be activated after admin review.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

unavailable.title: This club is currently unavailable
unavailable.body: This club isn't active yet. Please check back later.

manage.title: Club management
manage.setupIntro: Complete these to open bookings later.

skillLevels.title: Skill levels
skillLevels.intro: Define your club's ordered levels. Members are assigned a level; boats can require a minimum level.
skillLevels.deleteConfirm: Delete this level? {members} member(s) and {boats} boat(s) reference it and will be reset to no level.

boats.title: Boats
boats.intro: Define your boat types. Seats set the session capacity; eligibility limits who can book.
boats.name: Name
boats.needSkillLevels: Tip: add skill levels first if you want to require a minimum level.

schedule.title: Weekly schedule
schedule.intro: Set the recurring time windows for each weekday and which boats run in each.
schedule.needBoats: Add at least one active boat type first, on the Boats page.

errors.end_before_start: End time must be after the start time.
errors.uneven_tiling: Session length must divide the window evenly (no leftover minutes).
errors.overlap: This window overlaps another window on the same day.
errors.invalid_boats: Pick at least one active boat; no duplicates, quantity at least 1.
errors.generic: Could not save. Check the values and try again.

profile.title: Public profile
profile.intro: This is what visitors see on your club page.
profile.name: Club name
profile.logoError: Upload failed. Use a PNG/JPG/WebP/SVG under 2 MB.

policies.title: Booking policies
policies.intro: Control when booking opens, cancellation rules, no-show penalties, MultiSport priority, and holidays.
policies.bookingOpenLead: A set number of days before the slot
policies.leadDays: Lead days (when using a set number)
policies.selfCancel: Allow members to cancel their own booking
policies.cancelCutoff: Cancellation cutoff (hours before start; blank = no cutoff)
policies.multisportHint: In Priority mode a MultiSport booking only holds a seat if regular bookings don't fill the boat.
policies.errorInvalidLead: Enter a lead of at least 1 day, or choose "Always open".

schedulePreview.title: Schedule preview
schedulePreview.description: What your weekly schedule produces for the next {days} days. Close or force-open specific dates below.

booking.title: Book a session
booking.description: Reserve a seat for the next {days} days.

reasons.payment_not_allowed: Payment type not allowed on this boat

errors.already_booked_this_slot: You already have a booking at this time.
errors.no_session: That session is no longer available.
errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.

cancelErrors.not_active: This booking is no longer active.
cancelErrors.cancel_disabled: Self-cancellation is turned off for this club.
cancelErrors.cutoff_passed: Too late to cancel this booking.
cancelErrors.generic: Could not cancel. Please try again.
